target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Cropped target shows catastrophic structural failure; roof and body panels are completely torn off; engine bay and chassis are exposed and mangled; no intact major components remain; consistent with K-kill destruction.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Catastrophic structural damage; entire vehicle frame is collapsed, body panels are missing or charred beyond recognition, engine bay and interior are completely consumed by fire, and all major components are non-functional and unrepairable.

summary: Two military vehicles assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence: one with catastrophic structural failure and mangled chassis, the other with collapsed frame, missing body panels, and fire-consumed interior. The scene depicts a road with two heavily damaged, burnt-out vehicles, surrounded by soldiers in combat gear. The functional impact is complete loss of operational capability for both vehicles, consistent with K-kill destruction.
